title: Take Profit Trader Check website

seo_content:
Take Profit Trader: US Futures Prop Firm Since 2021

Take Profit Trader is a futures prop trading firm based in the United States, established in March 2021. The firm operates a two-tier model: traders first complete a 1-Step Test account to qualify for a Pro or Pro+ funded account. Both funded tiers offer different profit splits and features, with the Pro+ tier adding a higher payout percentage and copy trading capabilities for up to 5 accounts.

Account sizes range from $25,000 to $150,000 on the Test program. With a 40% discount, pricing is: Test 150K at $216 (standard $360), Test 100K at $198 (standard $330), Test 75K at $147 (standard $245), Test 50K at $102 (standard $170), and Test 25K at $90 (standard $150). The $75,000 account size is a notable offering not commonly found at other futures prop firms.

The platform ecosystem is broad, including Tradovate, TradingView, Quantower, NinjaTrader, ATAS Orderflow Trading, Bookmap, Finamark, Investor/RT, Jigsaw Daytradr, MotiveWave, MultiCharts, R Trader, Trade Navigator, and VolFix. Trading is restricted to Futures instruments only. EAs are not permitted. News trading is allowed during the Test phase; on Pro and Pro+ funded accounts, trading is restricted 1 minute before and after specific high-impact events (FOMC, NFP, CPI, and Inventories reports).

The Pro payout provides an 80% split; Pro+ offers 90%. Payouts are available from day one if the buffer zone has been cleared. Processing is same-day. Payout methods include PayPal, Plaid, and Wise. Payments are accepted via built-in wallet, Credit/Debit Card, and PayPal. Traders must execute at least one trade per calendar week (Sunday to Friday) to keep the account active.

Take Profit Trader appeals to futures traders who want same-day payouts and a clear upgrade path from Pro (80%) to Pro+ (90%) as performance grows. Counter positions — holding open positions in opposite directions on the same or related products — are prohibited. HFT and micro scalping are not permitted. Copy trading is available on Pro+ for up to 5 personally owned accounts.
